ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., Apple Stock, 10-Year Bond) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* The unique ticker symbol for the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the instrument belongs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the instrument's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., New York Stock Exchange, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the exchange */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the exchange was founded */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* The start time of trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* The end time of trading hours */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the exchange's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades for the instrument */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* The adjusted closing price of the instrument */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* The dividend amount paid out on the date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* The split coefficient for the date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the date */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the market data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, client) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client making the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the report is about */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily summary, weekly analysis) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the content belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Actual content of the report */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., text, image, chart) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the content was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., moving average, trend analysis) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Actual result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the analysis result was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the notification belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., trading halt, sudden price movement) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* The user or users to whom the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, analyst, client) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
